  "findings": [
    "Condenser/heat pump clearance to wall or other units is below the manufacturer's specified minimum."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Relocate the outdoor unit to meet or exceed the minimum clearance dimensions specified in the manufacturer's installation manual before final inspection."
  ],
  "rationale": "Both the International Mechanical Code (IMC) and International Residential Code (IRC M1401) require heating and cooling equipment to be installed in accordance with the manufacturer's installation instructions. Insufficient clearance restricts airflow, reduces system efficiency, and can cause premature compressor failure.",

  ]
